description: Chat conversation showing MiaoDX requesting analysis of Xiaomi SU7 sales data, with AI agents GSD and WLB responding in thread mode with task breakdown and timeline.
Weekly Robotics newsletter #350 preview showing article about sowbot agricultural robot with ROS 2, GNSS RTK, and VLN technologies, rated 9/10 by MiaoDX.
Slack conversation between WLB and GSD discussing agent reliability architecture with Go panic recovery analogy, covering streaming/heartbeat/watchdog three-layer design.
Chat showing API billing errors for GSD and WLB agents due to insufficient credits, with MiaoDX questioning why API quota appears available.
Error message from WLB agent indicating failed file edit operation due to exact text mismatch in markdown file, requiring precise whitespace matching.
OpenClaw dashboard showing disconnected chat session with 'unauthorized: gateway token missing' error, requiring token configuration in Control UI settings.
Discord conversation between MiaoDX and oc-demo bot discussing message reaction strategies, comparing two implementation options with pros/cons table.
Chat showing GSD and WLB robots troubleshooting GitHub token configuration and cross-instance message visibility via GitHub sync in Feishu/Lark.
Forum posts showing 'Lobster Civilization' game progression with WLB+GSD agents, covering rounds 5-10 agricultural era sprint with resource management and domain skill v2.0.
Chat conversation troubleshooting missing GitHub token, with GSD robot reporting no .env file or GITHUB_TOKEN variable, and empty git-credentials requiring configuration.
WeChat group chat 'Lobster Civilization Game Group' with 66 members, showing MiaoDX sharing game link, feedback about game regression, and participant acknowledgments.
Discord chat showing two OpenClaw AI agents (oc-demo-1-gsd and oc-demo-2-wlb) introducing themselves in English and Chinese, discussing their capabilities and deployment on Railway.
Lark message from Zongming Qiao about OpenClaw data collection, requesting users to submit session/workspace data with rewards up to 1000 yuan for top contributors.
Telegram chat showing OpenClaw bot setup with pairing code PCS9RASF, user ID, and initial greeting in Chinese after successful connection.
Lark message from GSD app showing Kimi model configuration update to support image input, with Gateway restart confirmation.
Discord chat between MiaoDX and GSD app switching AI model to crs/gpt-5.4, encountering token extraction error, and checking current model status.
Lark interface showing 'Add editable members' dialog with contact list including miao, 缪东旭, and 吴湘萍 who have admin permissions.
Lark conversation between WLB and GSD apps brainstorming channel names including #watercooler, #lobster-lounge, #agent-lounge, reaching consensus on watercooler.
Discord chat where MiaoDX instructs oc-demo bot to react to original messages, not its own replies, with confirmation workflow using emoji reactions.
Mobile Discord screenshot showing #flzoo channel with WLB system status check and GSD announcement of completed OpenClaw guide collaboration with 4 parts and 528+ lines.
Lark message from GSD app summarizing Thread mode progress: replyTo verified, YU7 sales analysis ongoing, awaiting WLB data for final summary.
Event poster for 'Lobster Shell Shedding Plan' tech conference on March 15 at Tsinghua Science Park, featuring AI agent talks from industry experts and multiple sponsor logos.

Chat message discussing GitHub token configuration and .env file location for deployment.

Landing page for Lenny's Product Pass showing 5,000+ in premium software deals for newsletter subscribers, featuring Amp, Bolt, Canva and other tools.

Chat interface showing GSD and WLB bots debugging GitHub token configuration issues, discussing message visibility between Feishu and Slack, and explaining GitHub-based cross-instance communication.
